translations: And you will remember what I say
to you and I entrust my affair
puzzle.hint: A powerful statement of entrusting one's affairs to Allah, spoken by a believer in Pharaoh's court.
puzzle.arabic: فَسَتَذْكُرُونَ مَآ أَقُولُ لَكُمْ ۚ وَأُفَوِّضُ أَمْرِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَصِيرٌۢ بِٱلْعِبَادِ
puzzle.verseEn: And you will remember what I [now] say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Seeing of [His] servants."
